meta.title: Tekila Tours — Cancún & Riviera Maya Tours
meta.description: Book the best Cancún and Riviera Maya tours with Tekila Tours: Chichén Itzá, Xcaret, Xel-Há, Isla Mujeres and more. Transport included.
hero.subtitle: Tours to the best destinations in the Riviera Maya. With Tekila Tours, every experience is unforgettable.
tours.description: Every tour includes transport from Cancún. Explore each destination and book your favorite.
detail.book_note: Final price and availability are confirmed at booking.
reserva.description: Fill out the form and we'll contact you within 24 hours to confirm your tour.
form.name: Name
form.note: We'll contact you via WhatsApp or email to confirm.
form.success_msg: Thank you for choosing Tekila Tours. We'll be in touch soon to confirm your adventure.
booking.title: Book your spot
booking.id_notice_national: You'll need to show your INE or Mexican ID on the day of the tour.
booking.id_notice_foreign: You'll need to show your passport on the day of the tour.
booking.select_date_first: Pick a date to see the price.
booking.held_msg: Your spot is reserved. Complete payment before it expires to confirm your booking.
booking.held_expired: The hold expired. Pick your date again to retry.
booking.marketing_optin: I'd like to receive promotions and news by email. I can unsubscribe anytime.
booking.pay_secure_note: Payment is processed securely by Stripe. Your booking is confirmed once the payment is approved.
booking.err_hold_expiro: Your hold expired or is no longer valid. Pick your date again to retry.
booking.err_pago: We couldn't start the payment. Please try again in a moment.
booking.err_datos: Please check your details and try again.
confirm.success_paid: Your payment is confirmed. Your spot is secured.
confirm.pending_msg: Your payment is being processed. As soon as it's confirmed, you'll receive your booking confirmation.
confirm.not_found_msg: We couldn't locate the booking. If you already paid, please check your email or contact us.
confirm.cancel_msg: No charge was made. If your hold is still active, you can try the payment again.
booking.err_sin_cupo: No availability for that date and party size. Try another date.
booking.err_fecha_bloqueada: That date isn't available. Please choose another.
booking.err_excede_capacidad: The party size exceeds this tour's capacity.
booking.err_no_price: We couldn't price that date. Please try another.
booking.err_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.
